parameters.query:
SELECT
  co.order_number,
  co.status,
  co.total_amount,
  co.items,
  co.delivery_type,
  co.appointment_datetime,
  co.customer_notes,
  co.created_at,
  co.customer_chat_id,
  b.id AS business_id,
  b.business_name,
  t.telegram_id AS owner_telegram_id,
  t.preferred_name AS owner_name,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - co.created_at)) / 3600 AS hours_waiting
FROM table_1 co
JOIN table_2 b ON b.id = co.business_id
JOIN table_3 t ON t.id = co.tenant_id
JOIN table_4 pi
  ON pi.business_id = co.business_id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE co.status IN ('placed', 'enquiry')
  AND co.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  AND co.payment_status NOT IN ('confirmed')
ORDER BY co.business_id, co.created_at ASC
